creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
I've successfully upgraded to 1.0.1 from ports, it built and installed fine so I'm closing this PR.

I see that cacti is already at 1.0.4, simple PORTVERSION bump in Makefile and 'make makesum' appears to be enough, perhaps port maintainer could update official port?

Also, a warning for other upgraders: I ended up with clean install, even without importing old database, as I've encountered too many problems.
